title: Piracicaba, SP — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Piracicaba is a city in SP with a population of 410,517. An important industrial and educational center in São Paulo, known for its sugar and ethanol industry and the historic Rua do Porto.
